summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lensifyr AI-powered Photography Studio management platform. Tested both backend APIs and frontend UI flows including authentication, dashboard, event management, photo upload, and Find Photos wizard.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML validation warning: span cannot be child of option element

passed_tests: Backend API health check
User registration and login flows
Event creation and management
Image upload with mocked face detection
Profile management and updates
Stats API functionality
Landing page with hyperspeed canvas animation
Register page layout (image left, form right)
Login page layout (image left, form right)
Dashboard with banner, stats cards, and quick actions
Events page with search functionality
Create Event page with event code generation
Upload page with event selection and file drop zone
Profile page with studio ID and edit form
Settings page with appearance, account, and about sections
Find Photos 4-step wizard UI (search studio, select event, enter code, choose action)
404 page with error image and go home button
Protected routes redirecting to login when not authenticated
Logout functionality
Navbar showing correct links for logged-out state

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 features working, 1 minor HTML validation warning)
